name: Ruby & Jodi: A Cult of Sin and Influence
original_name: Ruby & Jodi: A Cult of Sin and Influence
overview: Mom vlogger Ruby Franke and rogue therapist Jodi Hildebrandt preach discipline — and yet behind closed doors, their teachings fuel a cult-like system of control, isolation and abuse. When a child escapes, the truth unravels and echoes beyond prison walls.
